description: Detects echo statements in PHP that may output user-controlled data without HTML escaping. JSON version flags all echo_statement nodes (cannot filter to only those containing superglobals without htmlspecialchars without #match? predicate support). Precision reduced per D-07.

flag.message: echo statement detected -- verify output is wrapped in htmlspecialchars() or htmlentities() to prevent XSS when outputting user-controlled data
